.editorconfig.purpose: verify repository editor policy stays parseable

.env.example.purpose: verify sample environment config remains routed

AGENTS.md.purpose: verify root agent routing remains visible

CHANGELOG.md.purpose: verify changelog remains part of release evidence

ci-fast-push.sh.purpose: verify local fast-push helper remains shell-parseable

Justfile.purpose: verify local proof targets remain routed

.github/workflows/.purpose: verify workflow changes stay inside security and local parity lanes

.jeryu/.purpose: verify Jeryu metadata changes leave the frontend build graph intact

apps/cockpit/.purpose: verify cockpit runtime and JITUX rendering behavior

apps/cockpit/src/gen/.purpose: verify generated core contract client stays present and typed

apps/shared/.purpose: verify shared React bootstrap code remains routed

docs/.purpose: verify documentation remains aligned with release proof

ops/.purpose: verify local CI helpers remain shell-parseable

packages/ux-qa/.purpose: verify UX QA package and receipts

scripts/.purpose: verify local CI entry points remain shell-parseable
